2605.18313.title: Wasserstein Equilibrium Decoding for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
2605.18313.paper_summary: Small vision-language models (2-8B) are well-suited for clin- ical deployment due to privacy constraints, limited connectivity, and low-latency requirements favouring on-device or on-premise inference. However, their limited capacity exacerbates the generation of plausible but incorrect outputs. We extend game-theoretic decoding, previously restricted to text-only, closed-ended NLP tasks, to vision-language mod- els for open-ended Medical VQA. We introduce a semantically aware Wasserstein stopping criterion that replaces lexical order matching, en- abling convergence based on semantic consensus among near-synonymous candidate answers and avoiding unnecessary iterations caused by clini- cally equivalent ranking swaps. On VQA-RAD and PathVQA, we ob- tain consistent, statistically significant improvements over greedy and discriminative baselines. On VQA-RAD, we improve Qwen3-VL-2B by +3.5 percentage points (p < 0.01), surpassing the greedy 4B model, with similar trends at larger scales. On PathVQA, Gemma-3-4B with BDG matches MedGemma-4B under greedy decoding despite no domain- specific fine-tuning. At accuracy parity with classic BDG, the Wasser- stein criterion reduces average convergence iterations by approximately 20%, improving inference efficiency while preserving the game-theoretic equilibrium behaviour. Code is available at https://github.com/luca-hagen/ Wasserstein-BDG-medical-VQA.
2605.18313.paper_summary_zh: 小型視覺-語言模型（2-8B）非常適合臨床部署，因為隱私限制、連接性有限以及低延遲需求更偏好於設備內或本地推理。<lb/>然而，它們的容量有限，加劇了生成看似合理但不正確的輸出。我們將博弈論解碼擴展到視覺-語言模型，用於開放式醫學視覺問答（Medical VQA），這在之前僅限於文本的封閉式自然語言處理任務。<lb/>我們引入了一種語義感知的Wasserstein停止標準，取代了詞彙順序匹配，從而使收斂基於近義候選答案之間的語義共識，並避免因臨床上等效的排名交換而導致的不必要迭代。在VQA-RAD和PathVQA上，我們在貪婪和判別基準上獲得了一致且具有統計意義的改進。在VQA-RAD上，我們將Qwen3-VL-2B提升了3.5個百分點（p < 0.01），超過了貪婪的4B模型，在更大規模上也呈現類似趨勢。在PathVQA上，Gemma-3-4B在貪婪解碼下與MedGemma-4B匹配，儘管沒有進行領域特定的微調。在與經典BDG的準確度相當的情況下，Wasserstein標準將平均收斂迭代次數減少了約20%，提高了推理效率，同時保持了博弈論均衡行為。<lb/>代碼可在https://github.com/luca-hagen/Wasserstein-BDG-medical-VQA獲得。
2605.18313.author: Luca Hagen et.al.
2605.18313.authors: Luca Hagen, Johanna P. Müller, Weitong Zhang, Mengyun Qiao, Bernhard Kainz
